heroHeadline: Tariff Shock, Bond Stress, China Slowdown: Recession Risk Rises in 2025–2026
heroSubtitle: Tracking macro warning indicators, central bank policy, and trade war escalation — from Fed's 50 bps cut (Sep 2024) to Supreme Court IEEPA ruling (Feb 2026) and Section 122 tariff reimposition
